chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 5299 of 2019 _________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ (Priority). 1. For order on Misc. No. 13192/21 (1 Rule 10) 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 26398/20. 3. For hearing of Misc. No. 23037/19. 4. For hearing of main case. -------------- 20.11.2024. None present for the Petitioners. Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ------------------ None present on behalf of the Petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing and matter was adjourned with a note of caution that if no body turns up to assist the Court, appropriate orders would be passed. In view of such position, the instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
